title: City of Chambers
description: City of Chambers adds a big flying structure in the air like the end city. ( it's only changed in to a trial chamber! )
body:
Explore the **City of Chamber**s, a mysterious big structure brimming with trials, treasures, Inspired by the iconic End Cities, the City of Chambers is a fortress-like structure filled with unique rooms, and rewarding challenges designed to test even the bravest adventurers.

![city of chambers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d496d878ea204780f2b6501654ab113f734fe739.png)
![tricky trails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3376aa997efa39c37840117a9358e6b83cbf3d88.webp)
Multi-Level Tower: The city consists of multiple levels, each containing a Trial Chamber with different themes, mobs, and challenges. No floors are the same, keeping the gameplay exciting and unpredictable. 

![spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2e45f78f574c76e1cb71111594c54bcf128062_0.webp)

**Defend by trial spawners!**

![maca](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d56fbef3c8ea1ba93f87c156c169e417e8348b_0.webp)

**Clear the tower and obtain the  2x mace!**

![breeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a800538fc8937e2adec56cb67778234993cdc366_0.webp)

**Fight the minecraft mobs in the tower: bogged, breeze, and more!**

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
#AD
